news.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

news.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

news.title: Rolling Stones' Mick Jagger and Keith Richards Talk AI, Olivia Rodrigo
news.description: [ROLLING STONE] The Rolling Stones' Mick Jagger and Keith Richards discussed artificial intelligence and Olivia Rodrigo in a recent interview.

news.title: MLB outlaws generative AI in dugouts
news.description: [NBC SPORTS] The Athletic reports MLB has "effectively outlawed" using dugout iPads to access generative artificial intelligence.

news.title: MLB Reportedly Outlaws Use of Dugout iPads to Access AI for In-Game Strategy
news.description: [BLEACHER REPORT] MLB reportedly took a step to stop artificial intelligence from aiding teams during games.

news.title: Chinese Researchers Develop Optical AI Network Claiming 100x Faster Inference with Fewer Chips
news.description: [NATURAL NEWS] Researchers in China have developed an optical artificial intelligence network that performs inference up to 100 times faster than traditional electronic systems while using fewer physical chips, according to a study published in November 2025. The...

news.title: AI-based nursing interventions can improve care of people living with chronic illnesses
news.description: [NEWS-MEDICAL.NET] Artificial intelligence (AI) is helping nurses better predict health problems before they become emergencies, according to a new review of existing research published in JMIR Nursing.

news.title: Meta AI adds additional safety measures
news.description: [SOCIAL MEDIA TODAY] Updates include parental alerts when children engage in self harm or suicide-related chats with the artificial intelligence tools.

news.title: 10 Ways Small Businesses Can Use AI To Grow-And Even Hire More Workers
news.description: [FORBES] Experts presented useful tips and an optimistic view of artificial intelligence to a House Committee, insisting that small businesses using AI add sales and workers.

news.title: Zero trust must now move at agent speed

news.title: Taxpayer group warns New York's AI data center moratorium could cost jobs and investment
news.description: [BALTIMORE NEWS] New York has become the first state to impose a moratorium on new hyperscale artificial intelligence data center projects, a move supporters say is necessary.

news.title: Taxpayer group warns New York's AI data center moratorium could cost jobs and investment
news.description: [WJLA] New York has become the first state to impose a moratorium on new hyperscale artificial intelligence data center projects, a move supporters say is necessary.

news.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

news.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

news.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
